amaris_story.md — Epilogue: The Stranger in the Greenveil (campaign complete)
Morning on the porch. Tea, birds back in the Greenveil, deed in the house. Amaris owns Briarstone; the crisis ended while she slept — a stranger did the work and vanished.

Type an action below to continue. Future turns will be recorded to the sidecar so subsequent restarts resume cleanly.
